# STACK DO – LAS VEGAS PLAN

## Overview

Group size: 10 people  
Duration: 4 nights  
Location: Planet Hollywood \(Las Vegas Strip\)  

Goal:
High-energy first two days \(clubbing / party\), one show night, shooting/fire experience, optional activities, and a relaxed final day with a paella + beers competition.

Budget structure:
- Core budget target: ~$10,000 \(covered by me\)
- Max total exposure: ~$15,000

---

# What I Am Covering \(Core Experience\)

## 🏨 Hotel – Planet Hollywood \(4 nights\)
- 3 rooms \(3+3+4 people\)
- **$1,800 total** \(dates: Aug 23–28, 2026 — flexible\)
- [Book on Caesars.com]\(https://www.caesars.com/book/payment?dsclid=76692420564357120&utm_campaign=dsoft_PHV&utm_content=googlehpa-org&utm_medium=metasearch&utm_source=googlehpa&arrivalDate=2026-08-23&departureDate=2026-08-28&propCode=phv&roomCount=3&roomDetails=%5B%7B%22adults%22:3,%22children%22:0%7D,%7B%22adults%22:3,%22children%22:0%7D,%7B%22adults%22:4,%22children%22:0%7D%5D&roomType=ROH\)

## 🍾 Nightclub VIP Tables \(2 Nights\)

### Night 1 – Disco Pussy
- Mid-tier table for 10
- Budget: $1,200–$1,500

### Night 2 – Mega Club with Pool \(TBD\)
- Options: Marquee \(Cosmopolitan\), XS \(Encore\), Wet Republic \(MGM\)
- Mid-tier table for 10
- Budget: $1,500–$2,000

Combined nightclub budget: ~$2,750

## 🔥 Battlefield Vegas Experience
Options under consideration \(pick one or combo\):
- **Flamethrower** – fire experience
- **Machine guns** – multiple firearms package
- **Tank Crush** – [Crush a Car with a Tank]\(https://www.battlefieldvegas.com/packages/crush-a-car-with-a-tank/\)

Budget: ~$2,500

### Core Spend

| Item              | Estimated Cost |
|-------------------|----------------|
| Hotel             | $1,800        |
| Nightclubs \(x2\)   | $2,750        |
| BV Experience     | $2,500        |
| **Total**         | **$7,050**    |

Remaining flexibility inside $10k: ~$2,950

---

# Optional Upgrade

## ☀️ Pool Party VIP Table
- $1,800–$2,000
- If included, total becomes ~$8,850–$9,050

Alternative:
General admission only \(everyone pays own ticket\)

---

# Optional Activities \(Self-Paid by Each Person\)

These are not covered by me.

| Activity | Estimated Cost Per Person |
|-----------|--------------------------|
| 🔫 Machine guns \(extra rounds\) | $180–$250 |
| 🔥 Flamethrower add-on | ~$100–$150 |
| 🪖 [Tank Crush \(Battlefield Vegas\)]\(https://www.battlefieldvegas.com/packages/crush-a-car-with-a-tank/\) | ~$500–$600 |
| 🪂 Zipline \(Fremont\) | ~$50 |
| 🎢 Rollercoaster | ~$20 |
| 🎭 Show \(Atomic Saloon / similar\) | ~$120–$150 |
| 🎲 Gambling | Personal budget |
| 🍔 Food & drinks | Personal budget |

Expected personal spend per person:
~$500–$1,200 depending on activity choices.

---

# Show Plan

Looking at an Absinthe-level show:
- Atomic Saloon \(Venetian\)
- OPIUM \(Cosmo\)
- KA \(epic alternative\)

Tickets estimated at ~$130 per person.
Likely self-paid unless decided otherwise.

---

# Final Day – Relaxed Brotherhood

## 🍻 Paella Championship

- Airbnb or grill setup
- 3 teams
- 90-minute cook-off
- Secret ingredient twist
- Beers + sangria
- Relaxed ending

Estimated group setup cost: $500–$1,000 depending on venue choice.

---

# Intent

Start:
High energy, nightclub, chaos.

Middle:
Battlefield Vegas \(shooting / flamethrower / tank TBD\), optional activities, Fremont, show.

End:
Brotherhood, paella, beers, relaxed energy.

This is structured chaos, not reckless spending.

---

# Financial Philosophy

Core hosting budget: ~$10k  
No pressure on anyone to participate in optional activities.  
Everyone picks their chaos level.
GISTEOF)

- Open and flexible — eat wherever, whenever
- No fixed plan, no pressure
